cases.invariant: no verified commit and no local payload retention

cases.fault: crash before or after authority verification
cases.invariant: zero or one immutable commit; replay never duplicates
reject without destination fallback or silent switch

cases.fault: budget exhaustion or cancellation while leased
cases.invariant: lease released and no child falsely completed
reconciliation required; no output assumed committed
origin fallback without selecting another store

cases.fault: capture service has no configured policy
cases.invariant: 503 metadata response and ordinary page remains independent
original image restored once; no retained browser profile or bytes
